name: Dropbox Business
description: Access, search, upload, and manage files in Dropbox Business through AI chat.
user_auth_instructions: Each user connects their own Dropbox account through OAuth. On first use, you will be redirected to Dropbox to authorize access.
setup_notes:
Uses Dropbox's official remote MCP server.

Dropbox offers two MCP endpoints:
- Files: https://mcp.dropbox.com/mcp (browse and query files)
- Dash: https://mcp.dropbox.com/dash (search across connected apps)

Setup:
1. Configure your MCP client to connect to the desired endpoint
2. When prompted, sign in with your Dropbox account
3. Authorize access to your Dropbox data

Authentication uses Dropbox OAuth.
